info.name: Strava Re-Enrich
info.description:
Trigger Strava re-enrich to backfill new fields (max_watts, commute, trainer, has_heartrate, manual, perceived_exertion) for all existing activities.

**Auth**: Paste your Supabase JWT into the `auth_token` variable.
Get it from the browser: DevTools → Application → Local Storage → `sb-kreuvyttowiwztojuvtk-auth-token` → value of `access_token`.

variable.description: App base URL. Change to your Vercel URL for production.
Supabase JWT. Get from browser: DevTools → Application → Local Storage → sb-kreuvyttowiwztojuvtk-auth-token → access_token

request.description:
Queues an Inngest `strava/fetch-streams` event for every Strava activity the user has. Each event will fetch the full DetailedActivity from Strava and backfill all new columns.

**Response**: `{ "queued": <number> }` — number of activities queued.

**Note**: This only queues the jobs. Actual enrichment runs asynchronously via Inngest.
